title: 有馬記念の後に・砂利みたいな勝利

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Vodka runs full speed ahead in a stunning victory
over Daiwa Scarlet!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
After countless clashes, the pair end off another
year of competition with a win for Vodka!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Haha, thanks, everyone! It's all because of you
that I was able to have such a great year!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Go Vodka!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: I can't wait to see you next year!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. I bet that feels nice! Acting like some kind
of hero!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it feels awesome. I beat you and made my fans happy.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: But... that's all.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
This doesn't feel as good as the Derby did. My
whole body felt like it was on fire back then...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh? The Derby? Vodka...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I may have beaten you... but I still lost to myself.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
This isn't what I'm lookin' for. I know more than
ever now that this isn't the win I want.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What's wrong with it? A win is a win, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah, but even so, it's not what I want.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Trainer and I are reachin' for somethin' else.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
We're gonna have to put our rivalry on hold,
Scarlet. I've gotta get out there and find it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
There's something somewhere that only I can
reach... Peace out!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Vodka...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vodka makes no motion to go home today...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Sorry for makin' ya stay so late with me, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I've got so much passion lingering from this year. I
wanna wash it all away before the new year.
choice_data_list: So you can try to find your true, coolest self?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: That's right. I'm glad I ran the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I beat Scarlet, and my fans cheered for me. But it
just wasn't enough. I realized that what I really
want is something different.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: We've gotta find it together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems Vodka won't be satisfied until she finds that certain something—something greater than just simple glory.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So, which race should we shoot for first next
year? I wanna start over.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Start over, huh? Looks like Vodka really wants to
find that missing piece of her running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In that case, instead of running longer races and
getting caught up in tactics, a shorter race where
Vodka can just concentrate on running would be
best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In that case...
choice_data_list: How about the Victoria Mile in the spring?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The Victoria Mile... A no-tricks race of
straight-up speed.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's do that. Until then, what do you say
to joining me for some aimless touring?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are different periods to the Twinkle Series,
including a time to run without thinking of
anything else, and a time for soul-searching.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka doesn't even try to run away. She plunges
straight into this season of uncertainty.
